compounds.frequency: daily until desired tan, then maintenance dose

benefits.description: Tanning achieved with 1-2 tanning sessions per week combined with daily injections; maintenance dose with minimum 1 session per week thereafter

protocol_notes: 15 years of experience with MT2. Recommends 2-3 weeks as realistic timeframe to see results, not 4 days. Tanning sessions 1-2x per week during loading phase, minimum 1x per week during maintenance.
